com.softsynth.jsyn
Class SampleReader_16F1

java.lang.Object
  java.util.Observable
      com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthObject
          com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthSound
              com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthUnit
                  com.softsynth.jsyn.SampleReader
                      com.softsynth.jsyn.SampleReader_16F1

public class SampleReader_16F1
extends SampleReader

SampleReader_16F1 unit. This unit plays a monophonic 16-bit sample at the unit's execution rate (e.g., 44100 samples/sec).

Version:
JSyn Version 005
Author:
(C) 1997 Phil Burk, SoftSynth.com, All Rights Reserved
See Also:
Synth, SynthChannelData
